text:
There was a man with bad teeth who liked to watch horror movies late at night. Every Halloween night he’d buy a scary mask and go around trick-or-treating for treats. Nobody believed him when he talked about ghosts, but the mask... That mask! It always kind of gave him goosebumps. And sometimes he’d hear a soft moaning. Sometimes it could get pretty spooky.


One Halloween night he stayed at home. He got some cheap chocolate skulls. That’s what he always got. A big old, ornate one with googly eyes. He took that through the whole park. People smiled a lot. Everyone went wild for the big guy dressed as Doctor Frank-N-Fray.

By the time he came back, his dog was panting.

“I think I saw something.”

The dog never barked.

“I’ll call the animal control.”

The dog never barked again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
